scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run prisma:generate -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/api && npm run lint -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/contracts && npm run build -w packages/shared && tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p apps/web/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.ci:verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
